title: Trump demands deal from Iran and threatens more strikes
snippet: Trump demands deal from Iran and threatens more strikes. Source: trend.az

title: Trump issues a stark threat to Iran's new leaders on Truth Social — warns US military could target bridges and power plants if they don't comply with swift peace deal demands
snippet: Trump issues a stark threat to Iran's new leaders on Truth Social. Warns US military could target Iran's bridges and power plants if they don't comply with demands for a swift peace deal. Developing story.

title: Trump says new regime in Iran is much more moderate, we should do an oil deal with them
snippet: Trump says 'the new regime' in Iran is much more moderate so we should go ahead and do an oil deal with them.

title: In Iran Speech, Trump Reminds World How Obama Helped Get Us Into This Mess With His Pathetic Nuclear Deal
snippet: In Iran Speech, Trump Reminds World How Obama Helped Get Us Into This Mess With His Pathetic Nuclear Deal. The world may have forgotten what Obama's nuclear deal wrought — but Trump certainly made them remember.

title: Trump Threatens Iran's Infrastructure as Markets Fear Longer War — Bloomberg
snippet: Trump Threatens Iran's Infrastructure as Markets Fear Longer War. Via Catherine Lucey, Magdalena. Bloomberg.

title: Eyes on potential Iran ceasefire talks for relief — BTC hovers $66.5-67K amid geopolitical tensions
snippet: Bitcoin hovers around $66,500–$67,000 amid geopolitical tensions & holiday weekend thin liquidity. Eyes on potential Iran ceasefire talks for relief.

title: Iran REJECTS Ceasefire, HAMMERS Israel as Trump DEPLOYS 3,000 US Troops
snippet: Iran REJECTS Ceasefire, HAMMERS Israel as Trump DEPLOYS 3,000 US Troops. YouTube: Strategic Dialogue geopolitical analysis.

title: WAR DYNAMICS: Trump claims talks with Iran over ceasefire and Hormuz reopened progressed — Tehran denies direct negotiations. Source: AP
snippet: WAR DYNAMICS: Trump claims talks with Iran over a ceasefire and reopened Hormuz have 'progressed,' but Tehran denies direct negotiations. Analysis: Conflicting statements show diplomatic uncertainty even as military exchanges continue. Source: AP

title: Trump says war will end 'shortly'; Iran denies requesting a ceasefire — NBC News
snippet: Trump says war will end 'shortly'; Iran denies requesting a ceasefire. Also: Trump says he is strongly considering pulling out of NATO.

title: China: Root cause of Hormuz obstruction is US-Israeli illegal military operations against Iran; only ceasefire and stability can ensure safe international shipping
snippet: Chinese Foreign Ministry Mao Ning: Root cause of obstruction of navigation in Strait of Hormuz is US-Israeli illegal military operations against Iran; only ceasefire and restored stability can ensure safe international shipping. China calls on all parties.

title: BREAKING: 50% of Iran's missile launchers and thousands of attack drones remain intact — CNN
snippet: BREAKING: 50% of Iran's missile launchers and thousands of attack drones remain intact and in Iran's arsenal despite daily US-Israeli strikes, per CNN. US intelligence also shows large percentage of Iran's coastal defense cruise missiles intact.

title: Forward-looking data points to further increase in US unemployment — lowest since 2020 pandemic
snippet: Forward-looking data points to further increase in US unemployment: Gap between consumers saying jobs plentiful vs hard to find down to just 5.8 points in March, lowest since 2020 pandemic. Only 27.3% of consumers say jobs are plentiful.
